title: Zinthorn

{{Quote|For you, a wedding bouqet.|Trioculus, to his forced bride, Leia Organa II|<ref name="Queen" />}}
A '''zinthorn''' was a type of [[Flower/Legends|flower]] which was considered horrible.<ref name="Queen" /> It had [[Color/Legends|pink]] petals, a brown stem, and green thorns.<ref name="Alien" /> Bouqets of zinthorns were used in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Marriage/Legends|weddings]].<ref name="Queen" /> In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the events of the [[Trioculus affair]], which include [[Trioculus]]' failed [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]] with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] as portrayed in ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'', in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].</ref> the Imperial [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Trioculus]] intended to force the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] into marriage aboard the [[Moffship]] in orbit on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] presented the [[Prince/Legends|princess]] with a bouqet of a dozen zinthorns wrapped in a<ref name="Queen" /> red<ref name="Alien" /> bow, not knowing that he was actually giving them to a [[Human replica droid]], [[Leia Organa II]], who had been switched with the real Organa by her fellow Rebels. Leia Organa II accepted the flowers without hesitation, and later shot Trioculus with her [[Laser/Legends|laser]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] while still holding them.<ref name="Queen" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zinthorns first appeared in ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'', a [[1993]] junior novel by [[Paul Davis|Paul]] and [[Hollace Davids]], in which the flowers were illustrated by [[Karl Kesel]]. The novel described the zinthorns as black,<ref name="Queen" /> however, a version of the illustration from ''Queen of the Empire'', colorized by [[Mark Hudson]], was included in the [[StarWars.com]] article ''[[Barely Tolerable: Alien Henchmen of the Empire]]'', in which the zinthorns were portrayed with pink petals.<ref name="Alien" />
